name: Palantir Ecosystem
summary: Drill-in on Palantir and its competitive landscape focusing on government and enterprise AI/data analytics platforms. Thesis centers on PLTR's unique position in classified government contracts versus commercial peers, with valuation hinging on growth sustainability, margin expansion from Foundry/AIP adoption, and competitive threats from hyperscalers and specialized AI players.

relationships.note: Azure competes with Palantir's government/enterprise AI platforms
Booz Allen integrates Palantir tech in defense/intel solutions

valuation.erp_basis: Elevated 0.5pp premium for government contract volatility and AI execution risk
valuation.terminal_growth_basis: GDP+ for long-term AI adoption curve in government/enterprise markets
